summary: Addresses external review feedback from greptile-apps[bot]: adds IPFamilyPolicy static defaulting to SingleStack in ServiceSpecDefaults (normalize/service.go) and preserves IPFamilies from the existing spec in EnsureService (deployment/deployment.go). Both unit tests updated to cover the new field. Changes are minimal, correct, and consistent with the existing pattern of preserving API-server-assigned fields (ClusterIP, ClusterIPs, NodePort).

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (go test ./normalize/... passes, 13 tests)
Edge cases covered (preserves explicit non-default IPFamilyPolicy value)
Both default and preserve-explicit paths tested

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (mirrors ClusterIP/ClusterIPs preservation)
Clear inline comment with CC-0005 tag

security_checklist.item: No user input handled — internal library functions only

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible — single-line preservation + 4-line defaulting
Consistent with existing normalize/preserve split pattern

fail_fast_checklist.item: N/A — no error paths introduced in this change

defensive_checklist.item: Nil-guard on IPFamilyPolicy matches existing InternalTrafficPolicy pattern
